title: Runtime Telemetry
description: Runtime telemetry signals captured during a CAP analysis or LLM dialogue turn. Used for operator admissibility, risk throttling, and self-audit.

rag_confidence.description: Retrieval confidence in source evidence backing this turn.

entropy.description: Entropy / noise level of the response sampling distribution. 0 = deterministic, 1 = maximum noise.

transition_cost.description: Estimated cost of moving from current state to proposed next state. Engineering default; not an ontological constant.

claim_strength.description: Subjective strength of the claim being made. Should be calibrated against rag_confidence.

validator_action.description: Action taken by the validator on this turn.

source_validity.description: Validity classification of evidence sources cited in the turn.

telemetry_state.description: Classified telemetry state. Determines which operators are admissible.
